title: useless-break
description: "Remove redundant break statements."
sidebar:
  badge:

    class: severity-indicator severity-note

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Remove redundant break statements. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
switch value { case 1: use(); break }
```

## Good

```go
switch value { case 1: use() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only useless-break`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
